summary: This checkpoint exposes the W1496/W1494 raw-field closed-embedding route through the canonical bounded-derived bridge and OriginalFourTaskProductData surface. W1496 supplies the 74-field construction surface, W1494 projects the closed-embedding W718/W519 providers, and the existing W1539 direct-source bridge supplies the stable package. This is not product success because the 74 raw-field obligations are still caller-supplied and no nullary OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess declaration is introduced.
obligations_discharged: Added BoundedDerived.Metrizable W1496RawFieldInput and raw-field input-name count surface.
Added W1496 raw-field projections for the W1494 closed-embedding component and mapped-cokernel providers.
Added W1496 raw-field full-data and closed-embedding stable-package bridge declarations.
Added OriginalFourTaskProductData constructors and projection/equality lemmas for the W1496 raw-field closed-embedding route.
Updated RequiredDeclarations to check the W1496/W1494 Dbounded, bounded-derived bridge, and ProductData surfaces.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: The ProductData-facing closed-embedding route no longer has to stop at a caller-supplied W987 full-data provider.
The W1494 closed-embedding W718/W519 providers are now projected directly from the W1496 raw-field input.
The W1496 route is connected to the W1539 direct-source and W1533 direct-localization ProductData surfaces.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.
No nullary W1496 raw-field input or W987 full-data provider was constructed.

The W1496 raw-field input still packages 74 target, relation, closed-embedding, strict-preimage, fixed-target, source-triangulation, endpoint, localized-right-adjoint, localized-unit, and unit mapping-cone obligations.
Typeclass synthesis still does not provide a nullary bounded-derived stable package for MetrizableLCA.
remaining_work: Construct a mathematically honest nullary W1496 raw-field input from true smaller providers, or identify the exact missing source theorem for each W1496/W1494 leaf.
Use a nullary W987 provider to build the bounded-derived stable package and then the original four-task product success witness.
Run the Tier C review packet and full contract audit before permitting update_goal complete.
